subcodes.first_line: In His name! We have, verily, revealed unto thee the Book and sent it forth unto thee as a token of grace from God, the Lord of the worlds. It hath been mentioned in Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: س م قد انزلنا لک الکتاب و ارسلناه الیک فضلا من الله رب العالمین قد ذکر لدی
